title: telesonix jamesii
intro_study: According to "Frontiers in pharmacology", telesonix jamesii (also known as jatrorrhizine) benefits include anti-diabetic, antimicrobial, antiprotozoal, anticancer, anti-obesity and hypolipidemic properties.
side_effects: Telesonix jamesii can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues in individuals with sensitive stomachs, resulting in nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Prolonged use or excessive consumption may also lead to an imbalance of electrolytes, causing muscle weakness, fatigue, and cardiac arrhythmias. In some cases, improper use of the plant may trigger allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. It is essential to consult a medical professional or a qualified herbalist before using Telesonix jamesii to minimize the risk of these adverse effects.
